title: xyris tortula
intro: Xyris tortula, also known as the Australian yellow eyed grass, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Xyris tortula include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its extracts have also been used in traditional remedies for various ailments.
